title: Roasted Paprika Potatoes
description: Buttery and crunchy roasted potatoes with a healthy dose of paprika for an energizing low-carb Irish dish.

ingredients.name: Potatoes
ingredients.amount: 2 lbs (about 900g) small or medium potatoes, peeled and halved lengthwise

instructions: Place the potato halves on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle each half with 1/3 of the butter and sprinkle evenly with paprika, salt, pepper, and any additional seasonings like garlic powder if using.
Gently rub the potatoes to coat them in the melted butter and seasoning mixture. Make sure they are coated evenly but not greasy.
Roast for about 25-30 minutes or until golden brown on top and crispy around the edges, flipping halfway through cooking time.
Remove from oven and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
